analyst_observations: The skill produces a +57% lift in structural adherence to the 4-phase workflow pattern
Without the skill, Claude produces useful analysis but unstructured — no health scores, no dependency maps, no TDD references
The TDD reference in Phase 3 is the most discriminating assertion — 50% with-skill vs 0% without
Health score and dependency map assertions are also highly discriminating (100% vs 0%)
Architecture diagrams and before/after code pass regardless of skill — these are non-discriminating
The with-skill runs take ~50% longer due to the more structured output, which is expected
